findings.title: Worker discovery is mocked out with no direct regression coverage
findings.impact: The new command selects the log file by parsing pgrep output in find_worker_pid, but every run() test replaces this method with a fixed PID. A regression in the pgrep command, dscli self-filtering, no-match handling, timeout handling, or PID parsing would still leave the added test suite green while dscli logs tails the wrong worker log or falls back unexpectedly.
findings.fix: Add focused tests for find_worker_pid with subprocess.check_output mocked for a matching worker, a dscli/self match that must be skipped, CalledProcessError/no match, and TimeoutExpired; also cover run() when no PID is found if the stopped-worker fallback is intended behavior.
